sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29414" key="dusplh/rwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-πλήρωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to fill</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fulfil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
